# Imperva Waf Tools

## Overview

Approval-gated policy administration for Imperva SecureSphere WAF 15.x.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `imperva_waf_manage` | Approval-gated SecureSphere policy, profile, rule, IP group and policy-association management. | `imperva:write` | ✓ | — |
| `imperva_waf_read` | Inspect Imperva SecureSphere policies, profiles, rules, IP groups and protected servers. | `imperva:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "host": "",
  "username": "",
  "password": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_base_path": "/api/v1",
  "host": "",
  "password": "",
  "port": 443,
  "timeout": 30,
  "username": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_base_path` | `string` | — | — | `"/api/v1"` | SecureSphere REST API base path. |
| `host` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | SecureSphere Management Server host or URL. |
| `password` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | SecureSphere API password (sensitive). |
| `port` | `integer` | — | — | `443` | — |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | — |
| `username` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | SecureSphere API username. |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Verify TLS certificates. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__API_BASE_PATH` | `api_base_path` | `string` | `"/api/v1"` | — | SecureSphere REST API base path. |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__HOST` | `host` | `string` | `""` | — | SecureSphere Management Server host or URL. |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__PASSWORD` | `password` | `string` | `""` | — | SecureSphere API password (sensitive). |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__PORT` | `port` | `integer` | `443` | — | — |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | — |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__USERNAME` | `username` | `string` | `""` | — | SecureSphere API username. |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Verify TLS certificates. |
| `TOOL_IMPERVA_WAF_MANAGE__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._
